hero_title_accent: Operational Control for Digital Asset Businesses
hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs manage jurisdiction-specific workflows by connecting regulatory rules, provider outputs, Travel Rule operations, and audit-ready case management in one platform.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_title: Compliance workflows slow with fragmented inputs
problem_description: Hong Kong VASPs face operational delays and inconsistent decisions when compliance data and provider outputs remain isolated across multiple systems. This fragmentation complicates audit readiness, weakens traceability and increases manual workload for critical jurisdiction-specific checks.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider outputs, regulatory rules and case management into one workflow layer to streamline Hong Kong VASP compliance, improving traceability, audit readiness and operational consistency.
workflow_title: From regulatory change to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY monitors jurisdiction-specific updates, maps changes to internal rules, routes provider checks and alerts, and guides cases through review to compliant decisions.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Hong Kong VASPs?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps Hong Kong VASPs manage compliance by connecting onboarding, risk, Travel Rule, regulatory rules, cases and reporting into one operational workflow tailored to local requirements.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support Hong Kong Travel Rule?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures Travel Rule message generation, routing, status tracking, exception handling and case creation aligned with Hong Kong rules as part of broader compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and linked evidence so Hong Kong VASP teams can review, audit and defend compliance decisions efficiently.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools into a connected compliance layer without disrupting existing provider integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule or KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but organizes their outputs into structured workflows, decisions, rules updates, cases and audit-ready reports.
final_title: Structure Hong Kong VASP compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific rules, Travel Rule routing, provider outputs and audit-ready cases in one operational layer.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
